text: As the birthplace of the LEGO brick, the resort offers a world of fun and creativity with attractions inspired by the iconic toy.

text: This is the residence of the Danish royal family and a must-visit. The change of guard ceremony happens at 12:00, which is a sight to behold.
It's famous for its modern architecture.
It's a character from Grimm's Fairy Tales.
